meta.title: LiveOn - personal AI plan in 60 seconds
meta.description: LiveOn creates a personal plan for meals, workouts, water and progress around your goal, budget and habits in 60 seconds.

nav.menuDescription: Jump to a section or start your personal plan.

hero.body: Calories, meals, workouts, water, and mood stay in one place. Every day starts with the next useful action.

pricing.title: Start free. Upgrade when Premium is ready.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
items: How does the AI plan work?
LiveOn uses profile data to suggest meals, workouts, water and daily actions.
How long does plan creation take?
The first profile is designed for a fast start: you can get a basic plan in about 60 seconds.
Can I use LiveOn free?
Yes. The Free plan helps you get the first plan and try basic tracking.
Can I use it without a gym?
Yes. You can choose home workouts and available equipment.
Does LiveOn consider my budget?
Yes. Budget is used when building the menu and shopping list.
Is my data safe?
Profile data is used for personalization and managed inside the service.

final.title: Start your profile and the plan comes together
final.body: Answer a few questions and LiveOn builds your first meal, workout and water plan for today.

footer.tagline: AI meal and workout plans for your goal.
